2604.13029.title: Visual Preference Optimization with Rubric Rewards
2604.13029.paper_summary: The effectiveness of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) depends on preference data that reflect the quality differences that matter in multimodal tasks. Existing pipelines often rely on off-policy perturbations or coarse outcome-based signals, which are not well suited to fine-grained visual reasoning. We propose rDPO, a preference optimization framework based on instance-specific rubrics. For each image-instruction pair, we create a checklist-style rubric of essential and additional criteria to score responses from any possible policies. The instruction-rubric pool is built offline and reused during the construction of on-policy data. On public reward modeling benchmarks, rubric-based prompting massively improves a 30B-A3B judge and brings it close to GPT-5.4. On public downstream benchmarks, rubric-based filtering raises the macro average to 82.69, whereas outcome-based filtering drops it to 75.82 from 81.14. When evaluating scalability on a comprehensive benchmark, rDPO achieves 61.01, markedly outperforming the style-constrained baseline (52.36) and surpassing the 59.48 base model. Together, these results show that visual preference optimization benefits from combining on-policy data construction with instance-specific criterion-level feedback.
2604.13029.paper_summary_zh: 直接偏好優化（DPO）的有效性取決於反映多模態任務中重要質量差異的偏好數據。現有的流程通常依賴於非政策擾動或粗略的基於結果的信號，這些信號不太適合細緻的視覺推理。我們提出了 rDPO，一個基於特定實例標準的偏好優化框架。對於每個圖像-指令對，我們創建了一個檢查表風格的標準，列出基本和附加標準，以對任何可能的政策的回應進行評分。指令-標準池是離線構建的，並在構建政策數據期間重用。在公共獎勵建模基準上，基於標準的提示大幅提升了 30B-A3B 評判者的表現，使其接近 GPT-5.4。在公共下游基準上，基於標準的過濾將宏觀平均提高至 82.69，而基於結果的過濾則將其從 81.14 降至 75.82。在全面基準上評估可擴展性時，rDPO 達到了 61.01，顯著超越了風格約束基線（52.36）並超過了 59.48 的基礎模型。綜合這些結果顯示，視覺偏好優化受益於將政策數據構建與特定實例的標準級反饋相結合。
2604.13029.author: Ya-Qi Yu et.al.
2604.13029.authors: Ya-Qi Yu, Fangyu Hong, Xiangyang Qu, Hao Wang, Gaojie Wu, Qiaoyu Luo, Nuo Xu, Huixin Wang, Wuheng Xu, Yongxin Liao, Zihao Chen, Haonan Li, Ziming Li, Dezhi Peng, Minghui Liao, Jihao Wu, Haoyu Ren, Dandan Tu
